meta.description: TikTok finance/ETF influencers for marketing research

influencers.name: Vivian Tu
influencers.focus: Personal finance, investing basics, salary negotiation, financial empowerment
influencers.sample_content: ETF basics for beginners, robo-adviser investing, index fund explanations, long-term wealth building strategies
influencers.engagement_note: 10M+ followers across all platforms. TIME 100 Creators honoree. Named Chief of Financial Empowerment at SoFi. NYT bestselling author. Former JPMorgan trader lends strong credibility.

influencers.name: Gary Vaynerchuk
influencers.focus: Entrepreneurship, investing, business motivation, personal branding
influencers.sample_content: Broad investing mindset content, occasional ETF/index fund mentions in portfolio diversification discussions
influencers.engagement_note: Largest finance-adjacent TikTok following. Extremely high engagement rates but content skews entrepreneurship over pure investing.

influencers.name: Erika Kullberg
influencers.focus: Money-saving tips, legal finance hacks, consumer rights, investing
influencers.sample_content: Financial loopholes, money tips with occasional ETF and index fund investing education for beginners
influencers.engagement_note: Attorney background adds unique credibility. Viral format with skits explaining financial concepts. Very high share rates.

influencers.name: Mark Tilbury
influencers.focus: Wealth building, investing, passive income, financial education
influencers.sample_content: ETF portfolio building, compound interest visualizations, index fund vs active fund comparisons, long-term investing strategies
influencers.engagement_note: Self-made millionaire positioning drives strong trust metrics. Content frequently goes viral with investment comparison formats.

influencers.name: Humphrey Yang
influencers.focus: Stock market education, budgeting, credit cards, taxes, investing
influencers.sample_content: ETF explainers, S&P 500 index fund breakdowns, Roth IRA + ETF strategies, visual demonstrations of diversification
influencers.engagement_note: Former financial adviser background. Known for prop-based visual explanations (e.g., using physical cash to explain concepts). Highly trusted by Gen Z audience.

influencers.name: Tori Dunlap
influencers.focus: Women's financial empowerment, stock market investing, salary negotiation, budgeting
influencers.sample_content: ETF investing for women beginners, index fund education, brokerage account walkthroughs, feminist approach to wealth building
influencers.engagement_note: NYT bestselling author of 'Financial Feminist.' Hosts top-ranked Financial Feminist podcast. Strong engagement from women 18-35 demographic.

influencers.name: Milan Singh
influencers.focus: Side hustles, passive income, practical investing tips, financial literacy for young adults
influencers.sample_content: Beginner ETF investing, building multiple income streams including index funds, passive income through dividend ETFs
influencers.engagement_note: Strong appeal to Gen Z with bite-sized financial literacy content. High save and share rates on investing tips.

influencers.name: Caleb Hammer
influencers.focus: Financial accountability, debt reduction, budgeting interventions, investing basics
influencers.sample_content: Financial audit format discussing ETF investing as path out of debt, index fund recommendations for debt-free viewers, blunt investing advice
influencers.engagement_note: 2.7M YouTube subscribers for 'Financial Audit' show. Blunt intervention-style format drives extremely high engagement and comment volume.

influencers.name: Dave Ramsey
influencers.focus: Debt elimination, budgeting, retirement investing, mutual funds and index funds
influencers.sample_content: Growth stock mutual fund and ETF recommendations, retirement account strategies, anti-debt investing philosophy
influencers.engagement_note: Legacy personal finance brand with massive cross-platform reach. Older demographic skew but growing Gen Z audience on TikTok.

influencers.name: Austin Hankwitz
influencers.focus: Stock analysis, economic news, investment portfolio breakdowns, ETF research
influencers.sample_content: ETF comparisons (VOO vs VTI vs SCHD), sector ETF analysis, portfolio allocation with ETFs, market news impact on ETF prices
influencers.engagement_note: Finance and economics degree. Co-hosts 'Rich Habits' podcast. Known as OG FinTok creator. High credibility with investing-focused audience.

influencers.name: Joyee Yang
influencers.focus: ETF education, market news, stock basics, beginner investing for Gen Z
influencers.sample_content: Dedicated ETF education content, brokerage account tutorials, ETF vs individual stocks, market news through ETF lens
influencers.engagement_note: Featured on NYSE ETF Central. Canadian-based creator covering US/global markets. One of the most ETF-focused creators on TikTok. Strong trust from beginner investors.

influencers.name: Taylor Mitchell
influencers.focus: Brokerage accounts, compound interest, ETF basics, financial planning
influencers.sample_content: ETF breakdowns by category, compound interest calculators with ETF examples, account type comparisons for ETF investing
influencers.engagement_note: Marketing background brings polished production quality. Strong engagement on educational ETF content with friendly approachable tone.

influencers.name: Kia Commodore
influencers.focus: Financial literacy for young people, investing apps, budgeting, fun fund philosophy
influencers.sample_content: UK-focused ETF investing, investing app reviews featuring ETFs, beginner portfolio building with index funds
influencers.engagement_note: Award-winning UK financial literacy advocate. Appeals to UK/European audience interested in ETF investing. Strong community engagement.

influencers.name: Timi Merriman-Johnson
influencers.focus: Practical personal finance, accessible investing education, budgeting
influencers.sample_content: UK ISA + ETF strategies, global index fund recommendations, practical step-by-step ETF investing guides
influencers.engagement_note: Award-winning UK financial content creator. Known for making finance genuinely accessible. Strong save rates on investing tutorial content.

influencers.name: Steve Chen
influencers.focus: Financial independence, ETF investing, account setup tutorials, self-taught investing
influencers.sample_content: Opening brokerage accounts for ETFs, ETF diversification power, which account types suit which ETF goals, FIRE movement with ETFs
influencers.engagement_note: Self-taught finance educator resonates with DIY investor audience. Content walks viewers through actual ETF purchasing process.

influencers.name: Alexis and Dean
influencers.focus: Couple finance, banking concepts explained, conversational investing education
influencers.sample_content: ETF concepts explained as couple conversations, banking background applied to ETF selection, real portfolio examples with ETFs
influencers.engagement_note: Married couple format (Dean is former commercial banker/CFO) creates relatable conversational tone. High comment engagement on ETF discussion videos.

influencers.name: 슈카 (Syuka)
influencers.focus: 경제 뉴스 해설, 글로벌 투자, ETF 분석, 시사경제
influencers.sample_content: 한국/미국 ETF 비교 분석, 글로벌 경제 이슈의 ETF 영향, 섹터별 ETF 추천, 초보자 ETF 가이드
influencers.engagement_note: 유튜브 '슈카월드' 250만+ 구독자의 틱톡 확장. 경제 해설 전문가로서 높은 신뢰도. 한국 재테크 커뮤니티 핵심 인플루언서.

influencers.name: 부읽남 (Book Reading Man)
influencers.focus: 부동산, 재테크, ETF 투자, 경제 도서 리뷰
influencers.sample_content: 국내 상장 ETF 추천, 미국 ETF 투자 방법, 연금저축 ETF 포트폴리오, 장기투자 ETF 전략
influencers.engagement_note: 유튜브 150만+ 구독자 기반. 도서 리뷰와 투자를 결합한 독특한 포맷. 30-40대 직장인 타겟층에서 높은 신뢰도.

influencers.name: 재테크하는 누나
influencers.focus: 여성 재테크, ETF 초보 가이드, 적금/펀드 비교, 생활 경제
influencers.sample_content: ETF 초보 입문 시리즈, 월급관리와 ETF 적립식 투자, 국내 vs 해외 ETF 비교, ISA 계좌 활용 ETF
influencers.engagement_note: 여성 타겟 재테크 콘텐츠. 친근한 언니 포지셔닝으로 20-30대 여성 팔로워 집중. 저축 댓글 비율 높음.

influencers.name: 머니썰
influencers.focus: 주식/ETF 투자 썰, 경제 트렌드, MZ세대 재테크
influencers.sample_content: ETF 수익률 비교, AI/반도체 테마 ETF 분석, 2026 유망 ETF 추천, 해외 ETF 세금 가이드
influencers.engagement_note: MZ세대 타겟 숏폼 경제 콘텐츠. 트렌디한 편집과 밈 활용으로 높은 공유율. 테마 ETF 콘텐츠에 특히 강점.
